{{Infobox character
| name = Blackwatch Guild Head
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
| name = Blackwatch Guild Head
| aliases = Head of the Blackwatch, Guild Head
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Guild Head
| affiliations = Blackwatch Guild
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Blackwatch Guild Head Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Blackwatch Guild]] Head, known as Bliss, is the leader of the [[Blackwatch]], an imperial guild tasked with studying and utilizing the power of [[Elders]] for the benefit of humanity. Bliss is described as a formidable and unpredictable figure, possessing significant power comparable to other major [[Guild Heads]]. She is characterized by her pale hair and a black uniform featuring silver buttons, often appearing as a young woman whose true age is difficult to discern. Within the guild's hierarchy, she is supported by her second-in-command, [[Alsa Grayweather]]. Bliss holds the authority to oversee members, such as placing individuals under her personal supervision or bypassing standard recruitment procedures. As a leader, she is also responsible for carrying out executions and possesses the power to bond with specific [[Vessels]], a trait shared by certain high-ranking guild leaders. The [[Blackwatch]] itself is a disciplined, regimented organization that uses specialized iron spikes to subdue [[Elders]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch Guild]] Head is a terrifying young woman characterized by her long, silver-toned blond hair. While she can be seen drinking tea, she is often dressed in a long black coat adorned with silver buttons. As the leader of her organization, she is known to issue various whims.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Guild]] Head is a young woman with long blond hair that is almost silver.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Guild]] Head wears a long black coat with silver buttons.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch Guild Head]] is a woman who drinks tea.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Guild]] Head of the [[Blackwatch]] is a terrifying woman.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] has a [[Guild]] Head who issues whims.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Guild]] Head supervises the [[Blackwatch Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Guild]] Head met with [[Regent]] [[Loreli]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Guild]] Head has an iron gaze.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A [[Guild]] Head fought a [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Guild]] Head is a position of influence.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Guild]] Head was gone along with the [[Champions]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Blackwatch]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
